title: hypericum asperulum
intro: Hypericum asperulum, also known as Rough St John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a popular treatment for wounds, skin irritations, and viral infections. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, promoting wound healing, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Hypericum asperulum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to create remedies for various health issues.
